firm_description: Cotton Consulting is one of the world's largest professional services firms and a member of the Big Four, serving clients across more than 150 countries. The firm provides audit and assurance, tax, risk advisory, financial advisory, and consulting services to commercial enterprises, governments, and non-profit organizations.
firm_capabilities: Cotton Consulting is the consulting arm of Cotton, one of the Big Four professional services firms, and ranks among the largest consulting practices globally, with capabilities organized across several major service areas including Strategy & Analytics (corporate strategy, M&A advisory, customer strategy, analytics and AI, and Monitor Cotton as their strategy consulting brand), Human Capital (organizational transformation, workforce strategy, HR transformation, change management, and learning/talent solutions), Technology (systems integration with heavy SAP, Oracle, Salesforce, Workday, and ServiceNow practices, alongside cloud engineering, cybersecurity, application modernization, and emerging tech work including AI/GenAI implementations), Customer & Marketing (digital experience design, CRM implementations, contact center modernization, and marketing operations), Core Business Operations (supply chain, finance transformation, ERP, real estate, and operations excellence), and Mergers & Acquisitions (pre-deal strategy through post-merger integration); in the federal and government space, Cotton Consulting LLP's GPS practice (Government & Public Services) has particularly deep capabilities in defense, intelligence community, civilian agencies, health & human services, and state/local government, with federal work spanning systems integration, mission analytics, financial management, and increasingly AI deployments, supported by extensive contract vehicles including GSA MAS, OASIS+, Alliant 2, and agency-specific BPAs; competitively, they are a large business (not small business eligible), frequently serve as prime on multi-hundred-million-dollar federal IDIQs, and tend to differentiate through breadth of bench and pre-built accelerators and IP rather than specialized boutique expertise.
certifications: Cotton Consulting holds ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management), ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Information Security), and ISO/IEC 20000-1:2018 (IT Service Management) certifications; is appraised at CMMI Level 5 for both Development and Services; maintains SOC 2 Type II attestation; operates under a Top Secret Facility Clearance (FCL) with approval to handle Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) per NIST SP 800-171; holds federal contract vehicles including GSA MAS, OASIS+, and Alliant 2; and is an accredited partner of AWS (Premier Tier), Microsoft Azure (Expert MSP), Google Cloud (Premier), Salesforce (Summit), ServiceNow (Elite), and SAP (Platinum)
